And so every website on the internet that uses an ad network to sell their ads typically is routed through one or a whole bunch of these exchanges, whether they want to be or not because imagine you're somebody who has a blog and you get a hundred thousand views on your blog a month and you've got a podcast and all this kind of stuff and it's just popular because it is.
